zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl Devereux於1440年出生在英國賀福爾時，她的父親Sir Walter Devereux29歲，母親Elizabeth Merbury29歲。她於1455年與Sir James Baskerville在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1499年在她的家鄉享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Devereux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl Devereux was born in 1440, in Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Walter Devereux, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth Merbury, was 29. She married Sir James Baskerville in 1455, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1499, in her hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl Devereux est née en 1440, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Devereux, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Merbury, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Baskerville en 1455, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1499, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl Devereux(이)가 1440년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Walter Devereux(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Merbury(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1455년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir James Baskerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1499년 그녀의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl Devereux родилась в 1440 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Walter Devereux было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Merbury, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Baskerville в 1455 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1499 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.
